name: Marvel in Motion
description: Inventions and rides that put the world in motion.

questions.hintText: Look for the Ferris wheel display.

variants.prompt: The cars on the Ferris wheel were as big as a...

scan.prompt: Point your camera at the replica Ferris wheel car!
scan.hintText: Find the replica car in the exhibit — it's as big as a school bus.

variants.prompt: What is the name of the man who invented the Ferris wheel?

scan.prompt: Find the photo of George Ferris!
scan.hintText: Look for the portrait of the man who invented the Ferris wheel.

variants.prompt: What year did the Ferris wheel make its debut?

scan.hintText: Look for the four-digit year on a plaque or label.
